name: medication-search-field
title: Medication Search Field
description: Async typeahead drug picker with a keyboard-navigable listbox and structured selection.

props.name: onSearch
props.description: Async candidate lookup; pair with the /drug-catalog API.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fires with the structured drug object on selection.

clinicalNotes: Show enough to disambiguate look-alike/sound-alike drugs — strength and form, generic vs brand — because a bare name is a prescribing-error risk (each result renders name + strength + form + brand/generic). Selection yields structured data, not free text; the caller still confirms the choice. The listbox is fully keyboard-operable (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) with aria-activedescendant, and async lookups are debounced and race-safe (last query wins).
notes: Round-2 form component; composes popover (anchor) + input as an ARIA combobox. Focus stays in the input; the listbox is navigated via aria-activedescendant.
